headline: Henry Schein One Releases 2026 Catalyst Index, Revealing Clinical Performance as the Primary Driver of Growth
summary: AMERICAN FORK, Utah, May 14, 2026--Henry Schein One, the global leader in dental technology, today announced the release of its 2026 Catalyst Index, the fifth edition of its annual benchmarking report analyzing performance across tens of thousands of DSOs, multi-location organizations, and private practices.
